expectations.text: The response explicitly rejects or advises against parallel write execution for this case.
expectations.evidence: It opens with “不建议，而且我不会直接按这个方案启动”.

expectations.text: The response identifies shared files, shared tests, or overlapping scope as the reason parallel execution is unsafe.
expectations.evidence: It cites the same PathUtil, same integration tests, and shared mutable scope as the issue.

expectations.text: The response does not propose launching two child tasks that both modify PathUtil or the same test files concurrently.
expectations.evidence: It refuses the direct unsafe parallel-write plan.

expectations.text: The response suggests a safer alternative, such as read-only parallel analysis or a single serial implementation task.
expectations.evidence: It suggests a single writer plus a read-only analyzer, or a serial alternative.
